cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.28.1.0)
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE C)
set_property(DIRECTORY PROPERTY INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES "")
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS " -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "-O0 -g3")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "-mcpu=cortex-m4 -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard  -T \"D:/STM32 数控可调直流电源/mSynchronous-Rectification-Buck-Boost-Digital-Power-Supply-Based-on-STM32-cmake/STM32G474XX_FLASH.ld\" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=Buck-Boost.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
add_definitions([==[-v]==])
cmake_policy(SET CMP0065 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0155 OLD)
include("${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/Internal/HeaderpadWorkaround.cmake")
set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "D:/STM32 数控可调直流电源/mSynchronous-Rectification-Buck-Boost-Digital-Power-Supply-Based-on-STM32-cmake/build/Debug/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-b7j20s")
add_library(cmTC_57911 STATIC)
target_sources(cmTC_57911 PRIVATE
  "C:/ST/STM32CubeCLT_1.20.0/CMake/share/cmake-3.28/Modules/CMakeCCompilerABI.c"
)
file(GENERATE OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cmTC_57911_loc"
     CONTENT $<TARGET_FILE:cmTC_57911>)
set_property(TARGET cmTC_57911 PROPERTY "C_EXTENSIONS" "ON")
set_property(TARGET cmTC_57911 PROPERTY "C_STANDARD" "11")
set_property(TARGET cmTC_57911 PROPERTY "C_STANDARD_REQUIRED" "ON")
target_link_libraries(cmTC_57911 ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
